title: I.T.
overview: Mike Regan is a successful, self-made crook who has it all: a gorgeous and disloyal wife, a spoilt and selfish teenage daughter and a sleek, state-of-the-art “smart home”. But he soon finds himself in a deadly, high-stakes game of cat-and-mouse when his I.T. hacker, Ed, starts using his skills to stalk Mike’s daughter and endanger his family, his business, and his life. In a world where there is no privacy, and personal secrets can go viral by the click of a mouse, Mike needs to pay off some old connections to get rid of the insolent pest.
